red.scenario: Pre-fix /contents/search?q=레미제라블 rendered duplicate search-like controls: header search affordance plus page query form.
red.observable: RED assertion failed with headerSearchSurfaces actual 2 expected 0 before implementation.

implementation.scenario: Search route disables header search affordances through TicketingPageShell while preserving header chrome.

verification.scenario: Focused regression test for one query form, preserved header logo/category nav, and q submission.
Production Playwright check of /contents/search and /contents/search?q=레미제라블 on desktop 1280x900 and mobile 390x844, plus mobile submit of IU.
verification.invocation: PORT=45152 ... npm run start; node --input-type=module <playwright verification script>
verification.observable: Each route/viewport reported headerSearchSurfaces 0, queryForms 1, queryTextboxes 1, header chrome present, no horizontal overflow; submit navigated to q=IU and rendered IU 검색 결과.

environmentNote: The initial npm run build failed before compilation because node_modules was an untracked symlink outside turbopack.root. The symlink was replaced with an untracked local npm ci install, then npm run build passed without flags.
